days.title: Arrival and Chinatown Discovery
days.weather: Partly cloudy with a chance of afternoon showers. High 32°C, Low 26°C. Seasonal estimate for late June.
activities: Check into accommodation in the Chinatown/Central area.
Walk through the historic streets of Chinatown and visit the Buddha Tooth Relic Temple.
Explore the Maxwell Food Centre for dinner.
days.budgetNote: Accommodation and initial meals fit well within budget. Food centre meals are affordable.

days.title: Marina Bay Icons and Gardens
days.weather: Hot and humid with scattered thunderstorms. High 31°C, Low 26°C. Seasonal estimate for late June.
activities: Visit the Marina Bay Sands SkyPark Observation Deck for panoramic views.
Stroll through the Gardens by the Bay, including the Cloud Forest and Flower Dome.
Enjoy the Light & Water Show at Supertree Grove in the evening.
days.budgetNote: Entry fees for conservatories and SkyPark are significant but manageable within the total budget.

days.title: Sentosa Island Adventure
days.weather: Sunny intervals with occasional rain. High 32°C, Low 27°C. Seasonal estimate for late June.
activities: Take the Sentosa Express monorail to the island.
Visit Universal Studios Singapore for half-day fun.
Relax at Siloso Beach in the late afternoon.
days.budgetNote: Theme park tickets are pricey; remaining budget allows for beachside dining and transport.

days.title: Cultural Heritage and Departure
days.weather: Cloudy with light rain showers. High 31°C, Low 26°C. Seasonal estimate for late June.
activities: Explore Little India for its vibrant colors and cultural sites.
Final souvenir shopping at Orchard Road or Mustafa Centre before departure.
days.budgetNote: Shopping and last-minute meals should be planned carefully to stay within the $1244 limit.

categories.name: Clothing
items: Light jacket or cardigan (for heavy AC indoors)

categories.name: Toiletries & Health
items: Basic first aid kit (plasters, pain relievers)

categories.name: Documents & Money
items: Cash (SGD for hawker centres and small vendors)

budgetPlan.summary: Plan around $415 per day, including a built-in $124 trip buffer for emergencies, weather changes, or outfit-related purchases.
